title: PiKVM Handbook
description: KVM over IP on Raspberry Pi

items.title: KVMD 1.65: VNC improvements and new API
items.content_html: What time is it? Release time! Meet the new version of KVMD: 1.65

items.title: KVMD 1.67: NumPad support
items.content_html: Added NumPad support, including for configurations with Arduino HID

items.title: KVMD 1.71: Improved IPMI server
items.content_html: The new version comes with support for ipmi health

items.title: KVMD 1.75: Hardware health monitoring
items.content_html: KVMD 1.75 is out and features hardware health monitoring in the web UI

items.title: KVMD 1.78: VNC improvements
items.content_html: There are two important VNC improvements in the KVMD 1.78 release

items.title: KVMD 1.82: HDMI-USB dongle support
items.content_html: KVMD 1.82 released. The main change is to add support for an HDMI-USB dongle out of the box

items.title: KVMD 1.83: Security fix for the V2 platform
items.content_html: KVMD 1.83 released with minor security fix for v2 platform

items.title: Security note for v2
items.content_html: After installation, Pi-KVM will be available via USB OTG from the managed server via the virtual serial console port

items.title: Ready-made images for Raspberry Pi4
items.content_html: Now we provide the ready-made images for Raspberry Pi 4. You no longer need to build OS manually!

items.title: KVMD 1.86: PS/2 keyboards support
items.content_html: Great news for fans of retro computers and tech priests: now Pi-KVM supports PS/2 keyboard

items.title: KVMD 1.88: Tailscale support
items.content_html: We added Tailscale to the OS repository for easy access to KVM from an external network via VPN

items.title: KVMD 1.90: Closing the stream window in the web UI
items.content_html: Now you can close the stream window in the web interface

items.title: KVMD 1.92: Support for mouse buttons 4/5
items.content_html: This release brings support for mouse buttons 4 and 5 in the web interface for all Pi-KVM platforms

items.title: KVMD 1.93 & uStreamer 1.22
items.content_html: This is a double release of KVMD and uStreamer with improvements and fixes

items.title: KVMD 1.98: Technical preview for GPIO
items.content_html: This is the technical preview for the ability to use custom GPIO pins for any purpose, such as connecting sensors or relays

items.title: Pi-KVM is now available on Raspberry Pi 1
items.content_html: We have added the ability to use Raspberry Pi 1

items.title: KVMD 1.100: GPIO and USB relays
items.content_html: This release introduces the ability to use GPIO and USB relays

items.title: KVMD 1.101: Improvement for the HDMI USB dongle
items.content_html: The main change in this release concerns the internals of Pi-KVM

items.title: KVMD 1.102: Improvement for the HDMI USB dongle
items.content_html: The new version features further work on libgpiod and an improvement for the HDMI USB dongle

items.title: We need help testing uStreamer
items.content_html: I need the community's help in testing the new version of ustreamer (the video server of Pi-KVM)
